creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Hi there,

I upgraded a system to the latest port versions of sogo4-activesync, sope4 and gnustep-base. After doing so, message details would no longer display. Folder and message lists worked fine, though.

Versions before / after the upgrade:

sope4: 4.0.4_1 -> 4.0.4_2
sogo4-activesync: 4.0.4_2 -> 4.0.4_3
gnustep-base: 1.25.0_7 -> 1.26.0_1

Being unable to pinpoint the issue on that system (I had to get back to a working state asap), I am reporting it for the sogo4-activesync package, although, seeing as those were just very minor updates, it might rather be the gnustep-base upgrade that was to blame.

Reverting to the old packages fixed the issue. The system was running FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p3.
